name: Cherry Vanilla Ribbon Pie
recipeIngredient: 3.4 ounce French vanilla instant pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Gradually beat in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
3. On low speed, add the cold water and French vanilla instant pudding mix until smooth.
4. Fold in the whipped cream.
5. Spread half of the cream cheese mixture into the pie shell.
6. Top with half of the cherry pie filling.
7. Repeat steps 5 and 6.
8. Chill for 2 hours.
